default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and optimization for Webstacks' blog, focusing on enrichment, refreshes, and conversion improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content enrichment to focus on improving quality, engagement, and relevance using new CMS components](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Prioritize refreshing/rewriting articles with significant ranking drops; remove or redirect low-value content](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Implement targeted conversion panels and internal linking to boost lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Streamline enrichment process by categorizing content types and creating bulk enhancement strategies](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

## Topics

### Content Enrichment Strategy

  - [Improve AI-generated content quality and reformatting (e.g., bullet points)](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Utilize new CMS components: image galleries, tables (screenshots as temporary solution)](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Add relevant screenshots, especially for comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Increase internal linking, both seamlessly within content and as "learn more" sections](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Implement personalized CTAs in conversion panels (e.g., industry-specific examples)](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Content Refresh and Removal

  - [20 articles identified for complete rewrites due to significant ranking drops](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Remove or consolidate low-value content (e.g., industry-specific on-page SEO articles)](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Consider creating comprehensive guides for competitive topics (e.g., on-page SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Shift focus to more niche, relevant topics (e.g., SEO for static site generators)](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Internal Linking and Conversion Optimization

  - [Address orphan pages using Ahrefs report](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Add internal links to relevant solutions or solution-focused conversion panels in top-performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Incorporate natural mentions of Webstacks' products/solutions within content](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Experiment with AI-generated recommendations for conversion panel placement and copy](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

### Performance Tracking and Lead Generation

  - [Set up separate rank tracking for enriched content in Ahrefs](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Use content inventory in Notion to track testing and data points](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Focus on content driving quality leads as the primary metric](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Analyze HubSpot reports for blog post download performance](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Current blog conversion rate \~1-1.8%; aim to increase with new strategies](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Devon to share HubSpot reports on blog performance and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Devon to provide Ahrefs orphan pages report](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Aida to prioritize articles for refreshes and enrichments](https://fathom.video/share/jkHdxYAZLNdPAwFr-_ewc4QiXMfTHVrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
